## Vrijen's Commitments

### 1. Send follow-up email to Edmund — same day
**Owner:** Vrijen
**Deadline:** 2025-11-11 (end of day)
**Context:** Packaging up the partnership discussion, experiment parameters, and proposed structure.
> "I'm going to package all this up and get you an email today."

### 2. Draft lightweight LOI for Superposition × Careerspan partnership
**Owner:** Vrijen
**Deadline:** Not explicitly set — implied alongside or within the email
**Context:** Formalizing the experiment around Careerspan Magic Links powering Superposition's candidate sourcing.
> "What would be really super is to like sketch out some form of like lightweight LOI."

### 3. Lock down Marvin Ventures LOI
**Owner:** Vrijen
**Deadline:** ASAP (no hard date)
**Context:** Securing official sanction from the McKinsey alumni fund (~200 founders, 400 active roles) to create a joint go-to-market path with Superposition.
> "I'm going to lock Marvin down so that we have a clear path to pitch their 200 so founders."

### 4. Run anything customer-facing by Edmund for approval
**Owner:** Vrijen
**Commitment type:** Standing agreement
> "We'll run anything, everything by you to make sure it's like with your approval."

## Edmund's Commitments

### 5. Identify test roles with Micro Vandali
**Owner:** Edmund (with Micro Vandali)
**Deadline:** 2025-11-11 (same day — "let me chat to Micro Vandali today")
**Context:** Selecting specific roles — likely forward-deployed engineer or GTM engineer types — where latent signal from Careerspan coaching creates differentiated candidate intel.
> "Let me chat to Micro Vandali today and pick out jobs that we think is a good example to test it with."

### 6. Intro to Sunset (wind-down / pivot advisory firm)
**Owner:** Edmund
**Deadline:** Not set — offered as a connection
**Context:** Sunset advises startups on pivots, soft landings for departing staff, and post-runway strategy. Could also be a potential Careerspan partner.
> "I think would give really good advice on this is like a company like Sunset... they find soft landings to anyone you want to let go."

## Joint / Mutual Commitments

### 7. Pilot experiment: Careerspan Magic Links for Superposition roles
**Owners:** Both
**Structure agreed:**
- Superposition onboards clients via voice agent → outputs JD in correct format
- JD feeds into Careerspan to generate Magic Link
- Careerspan surfaces filtered candidates back to Superposition
- Revenue share on successful hires
- Edmund not precious about candidate attribution — "Careerspan inside" model acceptable
> "Neither does the customer. So I'm very happy to present that as yeah, we're down on your intel. Right. It's Careerspan inside."

### 8. Joint approach to Marvin Ventures founders
**Owners:** Both (Vrijen leads, Edmund participates)
**Structure:** Superposition + Careerspan combo pitch to ~200 McKinsey-alumni founders
**Dependency:** Vrijen must first finalize the Marvin LOI

## Revenue Model Discussed

- **Revenue share** on success fees (Superposition's existing model)
- First 100 candidates free per role (employer gets taste of analytical quality)
- Couple hundred dollars/month per active Magic Link thereafter
- Edmund explicitly stated: *"We charged the success fee... we would just do like a decent revenue share"*

## Strategic Options Surfaced (Edmund's Framework)

Not commitments, but directional options Vrijen should evaluate:

| Path | Description |
|------|-------------|
| **Maximally company-side** | Become an API / picks-and-shovels for sourcing platforms (customers: Superposition, Juicebox, etc.) — *"imagine People Data Labs with intent"* |
| **Maximally candidate-side** | Charge candidates; become AI-powered talent agents — sports-agent model for top AI-enabled talent |
| **Middle way (niche)** | Find one role type where coaching interaction generates unique hiring alpha (e.g., FDE, GTM engineer, customer support) |

## Open Items / Unresolved

- Exact revenue share split not defined — to be negotiated via email/LOI
- Which specific test roles will be selected (pending Edmund × Micro Vandali discussion)
- Timeline for Marvin Ventures LOI finalization
- Whether engineer roles will be included in pilot or limited to PM/designer/FDE types
- Sunset intro timing and logistics
